title: News on the Fable Jacobian Conjecture
description: Recent reports indicate an AI solution to the Jacobian Conjecture has surprised mathematicians, according to news sources.

sources.title: AI’s solution to 87-year-old riddle takes mathematicians by surprise
A mathematician used Fable 5 to disprove a major math problem
A Mathematician Used Claude Fable to Disprove the 87-Year-Old Jacobian Conjecture in a Few Hours

sections.heading: AI Solution Surprises Mathematicians
paragraphs: According to New Scientist, an AI solution to an 87-year-old riddle has taken mathematicians by surprise.

sections.heading: Disproving the Conjecture
paragraphs: Glitchwire reports that a mathematician used Claude Fable to disprove the 87-year-old Jacobian Conjecture in a few hours.

sections.heading: The Tool Involved
paragraphs: Mashable states that a mathematician used Fable 5 to disprove a major math problem.
